assumptions: the first ZILFIT release should use one hero product
the first customer journey should stay simple and guided
the writing should remain premium and supportive without sounding medical
risks: unclear copy may reduce scan completion
medical-sounding copy may create compliance risk
next_required_validation: Hermes and Z-Claims review before production UI implementation
primary_user_goal: Help a first-time user understand the product quickly, complete a guided foot scan, receive a simple recommendation, and finish checkout with minimal friction.
ux_recommendation: Use short, premium, confidence-building copy with one main action per screen and no medical-treatment wording.
next_design_step: Pair this microcopy pack with final screen wireframes and handoff logic for app implementation.
